Commission: 2% of the front hall's net profit, Front Hall Manager 0.5% * 2 people
Commission on bottle fees/set meals, etc. Server promotion evaluation criteria can be found in the "Server Performance Evaluation Plan."
The kitchen's profit accounts for 2% of the total net profit, with the head chef receiving 0.5%.

Position: Dahuo (literally "load support", commonly used in the context of kitchen or front-of-house operations in restaurants)
